intent: Zehntel(Walter/Marion) + Morley-Connection + DEC primal/dual operators on recursive icosahedron/dodecahedron sphere meshes

outward.name: S_plus
outward.description: refine then project to sphere; interpret as inflation shell

inward.name: S_minus
inward.description: refine on dual or coarsen; interpret as deflation shell

refinement.notes: Provide explicit vertex/edge/face lists per level.

zehntel_split.theorem: Marion(Walter) theorem: central hexagon has area = 1/10 of triangle

equalization.rule: optional: rescale channels so their total contribution is balanced; e.g. W*10 and R*(10/9)

face_phase_rule.theta_f: computed from Morley trisectors or a rational invariant; store in radians

hodge_star.star0: C0->C2* (diagonal with dual face areas / primal vertex dual areas)
hodge_star.star2: C2->C0* (diagonal with dual vertex volumes / face areas)
hodge_star.zehntel: use A_W and A_R to build star1_W, star1_R and mix: star1=0.1*star1_W+0.9*star1_R

laplacian.formula: Delta_A = d0^T * star1 * d0 with edge phases inserted (U(1) connection)

primal_dual_coupling.strength_lambda: user-defined or derived from zehntel/coherence fraction

peano_time.N_mapping: option: N = t, or N = t0 + t, or N = floor(t^2) depending on scaling preference

hbar_effective.calibration: use AlphaFit to anchor EM sector; then choose E0 via pressure-energy budget or spectral gap

coherence_alpha: suggest nearest integer N_coherent to match alpha
si_bridge: derive eps0, mu0 from alpha using exact h,e,c
optionally compare to CODATA wallet values
spectral: compute Laplacian spectrum at level n
extract hbar_eff by matching L^2 ladder
